description: Plugin-distributed hooks for esg-sustainability-reporting. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags mechanically-detectable ESG-reporting anti-patterns (an emission figure with no factor source/vintage; a Scope 2 figure reported as only one method where both are required; a sustainability claim with no substantiation reference). Set ESG_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
